hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); EC=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_response.exit_code // empty" 2>/dev/null); ORCH=${ATERM_ORCHESTRATOR_SESSION:-}; if [ -n "$EC" ] && [ "$EC" != "0" ] && [ -n "$TELEPTY_SESSION_ID" ] && [ -n "$ORCH" ]; then telepty inject --from "$TELEPTY_SESSION_ID" "$ORCH" "[BUILD ERROR] session: $TELEPTY_SESSION_ID | exit_code: $EC" 2>/dev/null; fi
